summary: Completed testing of FAQ Chat popup functionality. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), but critical frontend issue found: FAQ Chat component not rendering on student pages despite being properly implemented in code.

critical_bugs.issue: FAQ Chat component not rendering on /treino page despite being imported and added to StudentDashboard.jsx
critical_bugs.impact: CRITICAL - Students cannot access FAQ Chat functionality at all
critical_bugs.details: Component exists in code with comprehensive FAQ database (6 categories, 30+ questions) but is not visible in DOM. May be JavaScript error, build issue, or conditional rendering problem.

integration_issues.issue: FAQ Chat toggle button not found in bottom-right corner of student pages

success_percentage.frontend: 0% (FAQ Chat component not rendering - cannot test functionality)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: FAQ Chat component (FAQChatPopup) is not rendering on student pages. The component code exists and looks comprehensive with 6 categories and 30+ FAQ entries, but it's completely missing from the DOM. Need to investigate: 1) JavaScript console errors, 2) Component import/export issues, 3) Build compilation problems, 4) Conditional rendering logic. Without this fix, none of the FAQ functionality can be tested.
